agentDelete.title: Delete agent?
agentDelete.description: This will permanently delete the agent and all its data. This cannot be undone.

workspaceDialog.title: Create a workspace
workspaceDialog.subtitle: Your team's home. Create one per product, company, or client.
workspaceDialog.tabNewHint: Empty workspace with the default team.
workspaceDialog.tabGithubHint: Clone a repo whose team.json scaffolds the agents, roles, and instructions for you.
workspaceDialog.githubDescription: Import a team from GitHub. The repo's team.json sets up agents, roles, and instructions automatically.
workspaceDialog.enableMethodology: Enable parallel-dev methodology for this workspace
workspaceDialog.enableMethodologyHint: Adds a pre-merge review pass so agents check each other before changes land.
workspaceDialog.methodologyEnableError: Workspace created, but could not enable methodology
workspaceDialog.protectedRosterPartialDescription_one: {{count}} default member could not be hired. You can retry from the recruiter.
workspaceDialog.protectedRosterPartialDescription_other: {{count}} default members could not be hired. You can retry from the recruiter.

toolbar.finishHint: Finish this task: mark it done and close the terminal
toolbar.finishConfirmBody: The session ends and the card moves to Done. You can start a new task anytime.
toolbar.newTaskHint: Finish this one and start a fresh conversation
toolbar.newTaskConfirmBody: The current task is marked done and a fresh conversation starts.
toolbar.compactHint: Compact the context (/compact): summarize and free space, keep working
toolbar.clearHint: Clear the context (/clear): wipe the conversation, same task
toolbar.clearConfirmBody: The conversation context is wiped. The task stays open with a clean slate.
toolbar.costHint: Estimated cost of this session at API list rates. Not what you pay on a subscription (e.g. Claude Max).
toolbar.contextHint: Context used: {{pct}}%. Use Compact or Clear to free space.

assistant.title: Your agents
assistant.body: Every agent in this workspace lives here. Switch between them with one click.

board.title: The agent's workspace
board.body: This is where the selected agent works. Everything you see on the right is scoped to that agent.

newMission.title: Start a new chat
newMission.body: Click here to open a fresh conversation. Each one becomes a task card.

tabActivity.title: Activity
tabActivity.body: The board of every conversation with this agent. Running, needs you, done.

tabRoutines.title: Routines
tabRoutines.body: Schedule work to run in the background. Useful for daily briefs and recurring tasks.

tabFiles.title: Files
tabFiles.body: Docs your assistant can read or share with you. Drop anything here for context.

tabJobDescription.title: Playbook
tabJobDescription.body: Your assistant's standing instructions. Edit any time to change how it behaves.

missionControl.title: Overview
missionControl.body: When you add more agents, this becomes the single board across all of them. One place to see everything.

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.body: Tools your agents can use, like Gmail and Calendar. Connections live here, shared across all your agents.

appTour.title: Replay the tour
appTour.body: Forget how something works? Click this any time to run the tour again.

newAgent.title: Add another agent
newAgent.body: You can spin up another agent here any time, or keep working with the one you have.

agentStore.title: Pick where to start
agentStore.body: Choose Start from scratch for a blank agent, or pick one of ours from the store and tweak it to fit.

outro.title: Now go build something amazing
outro.body: That's the whole tour. The rest is on you, have fun.

agentUpdate.title: Agent update available
agentUpdate.descriptionSuffix: The update has been downloaded. Reload to apply it.

authReconnect.heading: Squad, we have a problem
authReconnect.body: Your {{provider}} session expired. Sign in again to keep your agents running.

providerReconnect.title: Session expired
providerReconnect.body: Your {{provider}} connection ended, this happens from time to time. Sign back in and you're good to go.
providerReconnect.launchError: Could not open sign-in. Try again.

toolRuntimeError.title: Something got stuck
toolRuntimeError.body: A local tool did not start correctly. Try again, and report it if this keeps happening.

updateChecker.title: Squad, we have an update!
updateChecker.availableDescription: Version {{version}} is ready. You're on v{{currentVersion}}.
updateChecker.ready: Update installed. Relaunch Squad to finish.
updateChecker.errorInstall: Squad couldn't install the update. Try again in a moment.
updateChecker.errorRelaunch: Update installed, but Squad couldn't relaunch itself. Relaunch manually or try again.
updateChecker.noDetails: This update includes the latest fixes and improvements.

naming.tagline: Pick a color and name your agent

newAgent.nameConflict: An agent named "{{name}}" already exists. Choose a different name.

recruit.title: Recruit your team
recruit.subtitle: Pick the roles you want. Recommended ones are inferred from your projects.
recruit.subtitleFromManifest: Found a team manifest in {{repo}}. The roles below are what the repo author committed.

projects.noWorkspaceDescription: Pick a workspace to see its projects.

knowledge.noWorkspaceDescription: Pick a workspace to see its knowledge.
knowledge.subtitle: Curated docs that get injected into agent prompts. Audience filters still apply.

library.noWorkspaceDescription: Pick a workspace to see its abilities pool.
library.noAgentsDescription: Hire an agent to start filling the abilities pool.
library.subtitle: Skills, MCPs, and routines available across this workspace. Open an agent to manage its enabled abilities.

workspace.teamHint: Your agents and their roles in this workspace.

projectDocs.toggleHint: Edit CLAUDE.md, rules, and architecture for this project. Every bound agent reads them on its next session.
projectDocs.title: Project docs
projectDocs.hint: Bound agents see this body on their next session.

placeholder.claude-md: Per-project instructions for every agent bound to this project. Tone, file paths, must-knows.
placeholder.rules: Non-negotiable rules. The code reviewer treats these as blocking.
placeholder.architecture: System design notes, module boundaries, contracts. The architect and leads consult this.

workspace.docsHint: Agents read these docs automatically based on their role.
workspace.methodologyHint: Configure how Squad's parallel-development methodology applies to projects in this workspace.

methodologyMode.preMerge: Pre-merge, block merges to target branch (recommended)

workspace.methodologyNoProjects: No projects bound to this workspace.

teamManifestBanner.text_one: {{repo}} ships a team. {{count}} role to hire.
teamManifestBanner.text_other: {{repo}} ships a team. {{count}} roles to hire.
